hypothesis: If a hybrid Transformer–Mamba-2 encoder-decoder model (STR-Bamba426M) is pre-trained on diverse molecular representations using a custom BPE tokenizer, then it will learn aligned multimodal latent embeddings that yield superior clustering consistency, improved downstream property prediction across small molecules, polymers, and electrolytes, and accurate inter-representation translation because multimodal pretraining captures complementary structural and semantic information across representations.
